_comment: Stage 9e Inner arc miter — Steps 1-3 of doc/inner_arc_miter_plan.md implemented: (1) reposition non-BEV-BEV BVs along their face's bev edge in populateBoundVerts; (2) generate (seg+1)² patch grid via materializeArcMiterPatch with quarter-circle arcs on the b=0/b=N sides and bilinear interpolation in between; (3) emit seg² patch quads. Result: 22 of 24 Blender verts match exactly (corners + inner/outer arc midpoints + linear midpoint), the 2 deviating verts (the b=N 'side arc' and the center) are within 0.029 of Blender (within 0.05 tolerance). Topology still off by 2v/1f because Steps 4-5 (splice patch boundary into surrounding faces + emit bridging quads between strip endcaps and patch outer arc) leave the legacy cap polygon and a stray cap-profile mid in place. Remaining work documented in the plan.
